about.title: The Silicon Age
about.subtitle: From Transistors to AI
about.description: The Silicon Age is an interactive visualization project designed to map the complex evolution of computing and artificial intelligence. By connecting the dots between legendary companies, visionary pioneers, and breakthrough technologies, we aim to provide a holistic view of how we arrived at the modern AI era.
about.description2: Unlike linear timelines, this 4-dimensional map (Graph, Time, List, Space) reveals the hidden influence and structural relationships that define the industry.
about.disclaimerAIText: The descriptions, summaries, and key facts presented on this website are generated using large language models (LLMs) to ensure objectivity and coverage. While we strive for accuracy, artificial intelligence can occasionally produce hallucinations or inaccuracies.
about.disclaimerNoWarrantyText: This website is provided "as is" without any representations or warranties, express or implied.
about.disclaimerLiabilityText: In no event shall the creators be liable for any errors or omissions in the content.
about.feedbackPlaceholder: Found a bug? Information correction? Feature request?
about.feedbackSuccessDesc: Thank you for your feedback. We will review it shortly.
about.feedbackError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

detailPanel.selectNode: Select a node to analyze its history.
detailPanel.disclaimer: The content and links provided on this site are aggregated through AI algorithms based on objective technical keywords, rather than personal curation or subjective selection.

linksView.noConnectionsDesc: This node has no visible connections.
linksView.selectNodePrompt: Search for a topic to see how it connects.

welcome.title: Welcome to The Silicon Age
welcome.description: Explore the interconnected history of technology
